ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the size */,
  "size_order" INTEGER /* An order number to sort sizes in a logical sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "category_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the item is available in */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the item */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "item_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "item_material" TEXT /* Material of the item */,
  "item_color" TEXT /* Color of the item */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has admin privileges */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation is for */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the recommendation is for */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation (0-1) */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the recommendation algorithm used */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "bust_inches" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_inches" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_cm" REAL /* Sleeve measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_inches" REAL /* Sleeve measurement in inches */,
  "length_cm" REAL /* Length measurement in centimeters */,
  "length_inches" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_inches" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_inches" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest_inches" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "neck_cm" REAL /* Neck measurement in centimeters */,
  "neck_inches" REAL /* Neck measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" REAL /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_inches" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_to_sleeve_cm" REAL /* Shoulder to sleeve measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_to_sleeve_inches" REAL /* Shoulder to sleeve measurement in inches */,
  "neck_to_hem_cm" REAL /* Neck to hem measurement in centimeters */,
  "neck_to_hem_inches" REAL /* Neck to hem measurement in inches */,
  "arm_hole_cm" REAL /* Arm hole measurement in centimeters */,
  "arm_hole_inches" REAL /* Arm hole measurement in inches */,
  "hem_width_cm" REAL /* Hem width measurement in centimeters */,
  "hem_width_inches" REAL /* Hem width measurement in inches */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the item in the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_fee" REAL /* Shipping fee for the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the return belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the return */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the item in the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method of return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the review belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the review */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the item in the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the review (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "review_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  "review_unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as unhelpful */,
  "review_images" TEXT /* URLs to images attached to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes_items" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock for the specific size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id", "item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories_items" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item is featured in the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id", "item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_items" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the measurement is custom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements_items" (
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer measurement */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the measurement is custom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_measurement_id", "item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations_items" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the recommendation is custom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id", "item_id")
)
